summary: A Go-based migration and validation tool that translates Goss configurations and runs assertions against infrastructure, featuring a plugin system and Kubernetes examples.
concerns: uncommitted changes (1 staged, 1 untracked) during a failed build state
automated session metadata commits cluttering git history
potential over-reliance on test files to understand core logic
suggestions: fix the failing build immediately before proceeding with new features
disable or filter auto-commit session metadata to reduce git noise
commit or stash the pending changes to establish a clean baseline
investigate why key logic is primarily understood through test files rather than implementation files
